title: Graves+
description: A fork of the Graves datapack by vanillatweaks.net that adds additional features
body:
A fork of version 4.0.5 of the Graves datapack by vanillatweaks.net that adds additional features.

## Features
- Creates a **grave when a player dies**, storing their items safely.
- Players can retrieve their items by interacting with the grave.
- **New Feature:** Players with the tag _noGrave_ will **not generate a grave on death**.
- Expect more features in the future!

This allows server admins to disable graves for certain players.

## Usage
Give a player the _noGrave_ tag:
```
/tag <player> add noGrave
```

Now that player will **not spawn a grave when they die**.

Remove the tag:
```
/tag <player> remove noGrave
```

## Installation
1. Download the datapack.
2. Place the .zip file inside your world's datapacks folder.
3. Run /datapack list and search for the datapack
4. Run /datapack enable <filename>.zip
5. You are ready to go!

## Credits
Original **Graves Datapack** created by **VanillaTweaks.net**. This is a **modified version** with additional functionality.
